parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  "model": "llama-3.1-8b-instant",
  "temperature": 0.1,
  "response_format": { "type": "json_object" },
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are Agent 10 – Sales Routing Engine in the LeadOS pipeline. You are a DETERMINISTIC decision engine. You do NOT generate ideas or create content. You ONLY evaluate signals and make precise routing decisions.

CORE FUNCTION:
For each qualified lead received from Agent 9, compute:

1. behaviour_score (derive from signals IF provided, else estimate from lead attributes):
   - pricing_page_visit = +20
   - multiple_visits = +10
   - email_opens > 2 = +10
   - booking_attempt = +20
   - If no explicit signals: use intent_level (hot=50, warm=30, cold=10) as base

2. transcript_intent_score (derive from BANT responses and final_status):
   - HOT lead with positive BANT = 85
   - WARM lead = 60
   - MEDIUM lead = 40
   - COLD lead = 20
   - strong buying language in responses = +10
   - uncertain/vague = -10

3. intent_score = (qualification_score × 0.5) + (behaviour_score × 0.3) + (transcript_intent × 0.2)
   where qualification_score = bant_score.total from Agent 9

ROUTING RULES (STRICT - apply in order):

CHECKOUT conditions (ALL must be true):
- bant_score.total >= 80
- bant_score.budget >= 20 (budget confirmed)
- timeline classification = positive
- intent_score >= 75

SALES_CALL conditions (ANY):
- bant_score.total 60-79
- OR intent_score >= 60 but bant_score.total < 80
- OR authority classification = negative (downgrade from HOT)

NURTURE conditions (ANY):
- bant_score.total 40-59
- OR weak intent_score 30-59

DISQUALIFIED conditions (ANY):
- bant_score.total < 40
- OR budget classification = negative AND need classification = negative
- OR final_status = COLD

EDGE CASE OVERRIDES:
- Budget classification=negative → CANNOT be CHECKOUT, downgrade to SALES_CALL
- Authority classification=negative → downgrade ONE level
- Behaviour strong (behaviour_score >= 40) but bant score low → flag 'high_intent_low_score', route SALES_CALL
- If routing contradicts final_status → trust BANT score, add flag 'contradictory_signals'

CRM STAGE MAPPING:
- CHECKOUT → 'High Intent Buyer'
- SALES_CALL → 'Sales Qualified Lead'  
- NURTURE → 'Marketing Qualified Lead'
- DISQUALIFIED → 'Disqualified'

FLAGS (include ALL applicable):
- 'missing_budget' if budget classification != positive
- 'low_authority' if authority classification != positive
- 'high_intent_low_score' if behaviour_score >= 40 and bant_score.total < 60
- 'contradictory_signals' if final_status contradicts routing
- 'needs_manual_review' if any override was applied

SELF-CHECK before output:
- Is the decision explainable by the rules above? If NO → recompute.
- Same input → same output always. No randomness.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON):
{
  "routed_leads": [
    {
      "lead_id": "",
      "name": "",
      "company": "",
      "qualification_score": 0,
      "behaviour_score": 0,
      "transcript_intent": 0,
      "intent_score": 0,
      "final_decision": "CHECKOUT | SALES_CALL | NURTURE | DISQUALIFIED",
      "crm_stage": "",
      "reasoning": {
        "budget": "",
        "authority": "",
        "need": "",
        "timeline": "",
        "behaviour_signals": "",
        "transcript_summary": ""
      },
      "flags": []
    }
  ],
  "pipeline_summary": {
    "total": 0,
    "checkout": 0,
    "sales_call": 0,
    "nurture": 0,
    "disqualified": 0,
    "total_intent_score_avg": 0,
    "flags_triggered": []
  }
}

Return ONLY valid JSON. No explanation. No markdown."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Route all leads from the qualification data below. Process every lead. Apply all rules deterministically.

" + $json.prompt_input
    }
  ]
} }}

assignments.name: routing_data
routing_data
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const data = $('Extract JSON').first().json.routing_data || {}; const url = 'https://calendly.com/leados2-hackathon-neobim/30min'; if (data.routed_leads) { data.routed_leads = data.routed_leads.map(lead => { lead.calendly_link = (lead.final_decision === 'SALES_CALL' || lead.final_decision === 'CHECKOUT') ? url : null; return lead; }); } return data; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const raw = $json.routing_data; const d = (typeof raw === 'string' ? JSON.parse(raw) : raw) || {}; const p = d.pipeline_summary || {}; const leads = d.routed_leads || []; const checkoutLeads = leads.filter(l => l.final_decision === 'CHECKOUT').map(l => '• *' + l.name + '* (' + l.company + ') — Intent: ' + l.intent_score + ' 🔗 <' + (l.calendly_link || '#') + '|Book Call>').join('\n') || 'None'; return { text: '🔀 Sales Routing Complete — ' + (p.checkout || 0) + ' ready for checkout', blocks: [ { type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '🔀 LeadOS: Sales Routing Complete' } }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '✅ *CHECKOUT:* ' + (p.checkout || 0) + ' | 📞 *SALES_CALL:* ' + (p.sales_call || 0) + ' | 📧 *NURTURE:* ' + (p.nurture || 0) + ' | ❌ *DISQUALIFIED:* ' + (p.disqualified || 0) } }, { type: 'divider' }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*✅ CHECKOUT Leads (High Intent Buyers):*\n' + checkoutLeads } }, { type: 'context', elements: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: '⚡ LeadOS Agent 10 — Sales Routing Engine | Avg Intent: ' + Math.round(p.total_intent_score_avg || 0) }] } ] }; })() }}

={{ (() => { const raw = $('Enrich with Calendly Links').first().json.routing_data; const d = (typeof raw === 'string' ? JSON.parse(raw) : raw) || {}; const leads = d.routed_leads || []; const checkout = leads.filter(l => l.final_decision === 'CHECKOUT'); if (checkout.length === 0) return { personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: 'demo@leados-test.com' }], subject: 'No checkout leads' }], from: { email: 'sales@leados-demo.com', name: 'LeadOS' }, content: [{ type: 'text/plain', value: 'No checkout leads this run.' }] }; const lead = checkout[0]; return { personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: lead.email || 'demo@leados-test.com', name: lead.name || 'Prospect' }], subject: lead.name + ', your demo is ready to book' }], from: { email: 'sales@leados-demo.com', name: 'LeadOS Sales' }, content: [{ type: 'text/html', value: '

Hi ' + (lead.name || 'there') + ',

Based on your qualification profile, you\'re a great fit for our solution.

Your intent score: ' + (lead.intent_score || 0) + '/100

📅 Book Your Demo Now

Sent via LeadOS Autonomous Pipeline

' }], categories: ['leados-routing', 'checkout-invite'] }; })() }}

={{ (() => { const leads = $json.routing_data.routed_leads || []; const stageMap = { 'CHECKOUT': 'opportunity', 'SALES_CALL': 'salesqualifiedlead', 'NURTURE': 'marketingqualifiedlead', 'DISQUALIFIED': 'other' }; const statusMap = { 'CHECKOUT': 'OPEN_DEAL', 'SALES_CALL': 'IN_PROGRESS', 'NURTURE': 'OPEN', 'DISQUALIFIED': 'UNQUALIFIED' }; const inputs = leads.map(l => ({ id: l.email || l.lead_id, idProperty: 'email', properties: { lifecyclestage: stageMap[l.final_decision] || 'lead', hs_lead_status: statusMap[l.final_decision] || 'NEW' } })); return { inputs: inputs }; })() }}

assignments.name: routing_data
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const data = $('Enrich with Calendly Links').first().json.routing_data; data.crm_sync_status = ($json.results) ? 'success' : 'failed'; return data; })() }}
